vision_profile.current_state: Mohit is a 23-year-old B.Com graduate from Kota, currently working as a Customer Support Executive, earning 18,000 INR monthly with 1 year of experience.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest fear is that his commerce background will lead to rejection from technical roles, and he lacks specific skills in networking, SQL, and advanced troubleshooting.
vision_profile.vision_12mo: Within 12 months, Mohit aims to transition into a Technical Support Associate role, earning 32,000 INR monthly, securing a stable job with growth potential, free from call targets and rotational shifts.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is driven by the desire for a stable career with predictable salary growth, where his efforts are valued beyond call metrics, and he can avoid the demanding schedule of rotational shifts.

milestones.identity_statement: Build a strong base in technical communication and core IT concepts to confidently step into the world of technical support.

modules.title: Professional Communication for Tech Support
modules.description: Learn to communicate clearly and professionally, a critical skill for any technical support role, especially in writing.

skills.title: Crafting Clear Support Emails
skills.description: Master the art of writing concise, professional, and empathetic emails to users and colleagues.

video.title: Effective Email Writing for Technical Support

skills.title: Active Listening & Empathy in Tech
skills.description: Develop skills to truly understand user issues and respond with empathy, even in technical contexts.

skills.title: Explaining Technical Concepts Simply
skills.description: Learn to break down complex technical information into easy-to-understand language for non-technical users.

modules.title: Introduction to IT & Networking Basics
modules.description: Get familiar with fundamental computer hardware, operating systems, and the very basics of how networks function.

skills.title: Understanding Computer Hardware & OS
skills.description: Identify key computer components and understand the role of an operating system (Windows, macOS, Linux basics).

skills.title: Basic Network Components & Topologies
skills.description: Learn about routers, switches, cables, and how devices connect in different network layouts.

skills.title: IP Addressing & DNS Fundamentals
skills.description: Understand how devices get addresses (IPs) and how domain names (like google.com) are translated.

modules.title: Essential Troubleshooting Mindset
modules.description: Develop a systematic approach to problem-solving, learning how to gather information and diagnose issues effectively.

skills.title: The Troubleshooting Process Flow
skills.description: Understand the logical steps to diagnose and resolve technical issues, from identification to resolution.

skills.title: Gathering Information Effectively
skills.description: Learn to ask the right questions and collect relevant data to understand the root cause of a problem.

milestones.identity_statement: Dive deeper into networking, learn essential SQL for data handling, and practice hands-on system troubleshooting.

modules.title: Deeper Networking & Connectivity
modules.description: Expand your networking knowledge to understand common protocols, diagnostic tools, and wireless issues.

skills.title: Common Network Protocols (TCP/IP, HTTP)
skills.description: Understand how different protocols enable communication over networks and the internet.

skills.title: Network Troubleshooting Tools (Ping, Tracert, Ipconfig)
skills.description: Learn to use essential command-line tools to diagnose network connectivity issues.

skills.title: Wi-Fi & Wireless Network Issues
skills.description: Understand common problems with wireless networks and how to troubleshoot them.

modules.title: Database Basics with SQL
modules.description: Learn the fundamentals of databases and how to retrieve and manipulate data using basic SQL queries.

skills.title: Introduction to Databases & SQL
skills.description: Understand what databases are, why they are used, and the role of SQL in managing them.

video.title: What is a Database? SQL Basics

skills.title: Basic SQL Queries (SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY)
skills.description: Learn to retrieve specific data from databases using fundamental SQL commands.

skills.title: Modifying Data with SQL (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
skills.description: Practice adding, changing, and removing records in a database using SQL commands.

modules.title: Practical System Troubleshooting
modules.description: Gain hands-on experience in diagnosing and resolving issues across different operating systems and applications.

skills.title: OS-Specific Troubleshooting (Windows/Linux Basics)
skills.description: Learn common troubleshooting steps for Windows and basic command-line diagnostics for Linux.

skills.title: Application & Software Troubleshooting
skills.description: Learn to diagnose and resolve issues related to specific software applications and their configurations.

milestones.identity_statement: Master advanced problem-solving, efficient ticket management, and prepare confidently for your Technical Support Associate role.

modules.title: Advanced Troubleshooting Techniques
modules.description: Learn to use remote tools, tackle complex network issues, and analyze logs for deeper problem diagnosis.

skills.title: Remote Support Tools & Best Practices
skills.description: Become proficient with tools like TeamViewer or AnyDesk and understand the etiquette of remote assistance.

scenario.title: Guiding a User Through Remote Access

skills.title: Advanced Network Problem Solving
skills.description: Tackle more complex network issues, including firewall configurations, VPN connectivity, and performance bottlenecks.

skills.title: Log Analysis for Troubleshooting
skills.description: Learn to read and interpret system and application logs to pinpoint the root cause of issues.

scenario.title: Diagnosing a Server Crash from Logs

modules.title: Efficient Ticket Management & Documentation
modules.description: Master the art of managing support tickets, documenting solutions, and adhering to service level agreements.

skills.title: Incident Management & Prioritization
skills.description: Learn to categorize, prioritize, and manage technical incidents efficiently using ITIL principles.

skills.title: Effective Ticket Documentation
skills.description: Learn to write clear, comprehensive, and actionable notes for every support ticket.

skills.title: SLA Adherence & Escalation Procedures
skills.description: Understand Service Level Agreements and when and how to escalate issues appropriately.

modules.title: Technical Support Interview Preparation
modules.description: Prepare for job interviews by practicing common questions, refining your resume, and building confidence.

skills.title: Common Technical Support Interview Questions
skills.description: Practice answering frequently asked technical and behavioral questions for support roles.

scenario.title: Responding to a 'Tell Me About Yourself' Prompt

skills.title: Resume & Cover Letter for Tech Support
skills.description: Tailor your resume and cover letter to highlight your new technical skills and customer service experience.

video.title: Crafting a Winning Tech Support Resume

scenario.title: Customizing Your Resume for a Job Posting

skills.title: Mock Interview Practice
skills.description: Engage in simulated interviews to build confidence and refine your responses before real job applications.
